title: Sheshan #8348
definition:
Sheshan = "noble"

 1) a Judaite of the families of Hezron and Jerahmeel, son of Ishi and
    father of Ahlai
nasbUsage:
Definition: Sheshan = "noble"

 1) a Judaite of the families of Hezron and Jerahmeel, son of Ishi and
    father of Ahlai

    NASB:  a man of Judah
